Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
from PIL import Image

img = Image.open\('D:/GIT/tippg/css/images/logos.png'\)

# Extract individual cells for known teams to verify understanding
# Then look for Union Berlin and Heidenheim in unassigned cells

# Known: BVB \(Dortmund, l9\) = col 0, row 35 \(0px, -630px\)
# Known: Bayern \(l8\) = col 1, row 62 \(-18px, -1116px\) 
# Known: Kaiserslautern \(l1\) = col 2, row 26 \(-36px, -468px\)

# Let me extract and enlarge just the German club logo cells
# that are NOT yet assigned, focusing on areas where they might be

# First, let me understand the 4-column layout better
# The CSS positions use x=0, x=-18, x=-36 \(columns 0,1,2\)
# Column 3 \(x=-54\) is not used - probably flags or something else

# Let me create a grid showing all cells in the club logo columns
# Focus on rows that have unassigned cells

# Let me look for Union Berlin specifically
# Union Berlin has a distinctive red/white/yellow crest
# Heidenheim has a blue/red circular badge

# Let me extract all unassigned cells and create a reference sheet
unassigned_positions = []

used = set\([
    \(2, 26\), \(2, 52\), \(0, 21\), \(1, 63\), \(2, 46\), \(0, 24\), \(1, 54\), \(1, 62\),
    \(0, 35\), \(1, 81\), \(2, 17\), \(2, 20\), \(2, 33\), \(2, 55\), \(2, 56\), \(2, 57\),
    \(2, 59\), \(0, 13\), \(0, 38\), \(0, 109\), \(1, 41\), \(1, 56\), \(1, 58\), \(1, 60\),
    \(1, 68\), \(1, 75\), \(2, 34\), \(2, 23\), \(1, 20\), \(2, 42\), \(0, 111\), \(2, 29\),
    \(2, 81\), \(2, 89\),
]\)

# Create a large image with all unassigned cells, enlarged
cells = []
for row in range\(0, 113\):
    for col in range\(3\):
        if \(col, row\) not in used:
            cell = img.crop\(\(col*18, row*18, col*18+18, row*18+18\)\)
            # Check if cell is not empty \(has non-transparent pixels\)
            if cell.mode == 'RGBA':
                # Check if there are any non-fully-transparent pixels
                pixels = list\(cell.getdata\(\)\)
                non_transparent = sum\(1 for p in pixels if p[3] > 10\)
                if non_transparent > 10:  # at least some visible content
                    cells.append\(\(col, row, cell\)\)

print\(f"Found {len\(cells\)} non-empty unassigned cells"\)
for col, row, cell in cells:
    x = -col * 18
    y = -row * 18
    print\(f"  col={col} row={row}: background-position: {x}px {y}px;"\)

# Save these as a labeled strip
if cells:
    cell_size = 72  # enlarged size
    margin = 5
    cols_per_row = 10
    n_rows = \(len\(cells\) + cols_per_row - 1\) // cols_per_row
    out_w = cols_per_row * \(cell_size + margin\) + margin
    out_h = n_rows * \(cell_size + margin + 20\) + margin
    out = Image.new\('RGBA', \(out_w, out_h\), \(255, 255, 255, 255\)\)
    
    for i, \(col, row, cell\) in enumerate\(cells\):
        enlarged = cell.resize\(\(cell_size, cell_size\), Image.NEAREST\)
        cx = margin + \(i % cols_per_row\) * \(cell_size + margin\)
        cy = margin + \(i // cols_per_row\) * \(cell_size + margin + 20\)
        out.paste\(enlarged, \(cx, cy\)\)
    
    out.save\('/tmp/unassigned_cells.png'\)
    print\("Saved unassigned cells image"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont

img = Image.open\('D:/GIT/tippg/css/images/logos.png'\)

# Top Union Berlin candidates \(red+white, shield with iron imagery\):
union_cells = [
    \(0, 78\), \(2, 82\), \(0, 87\), \(2, 35\), \(2, 65\), \(0, 27\),
    \(2, 62\), \(0, 52\), \(1, 76\), \(0, 70\), \(0, 73\), \(0, 62\),
]

# Top Heidenheim candidates \(blue+red circle\):
heiden_cells = [
    \(0, 41\), \(2, 70\), \(0, 106\), \(2, 97\), \(0, 47\), \(2, 73\),
    \(2, 105\), \(1, 4\), \(0, 18\), \(0, 15\), \(2, 43\), \(0, 69\),
]

def make_grid\(cells, title, filename\):
    cell_size = 72
    margin = 4
    label_h = 16
    cols = 6
    rows = \(len\(cells\) + cols - 1\) // cols
    w = cols * \(cell_size + margin\) + margin
    h = rows * \(cell_size + margin + label_h\) + margin
    out = Image.new\('RGB', \(w, h\), \(255, 255, 255\)\)
    draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(out\)
    
    for i, \(col, row\) in enumerate\(cells\):
        cell = img.crop\(\(col*18, row*18, col*18+18, row*18+18\)\)
        enlarged = cell.resize\(\(cell_size, cell_size\), Image.NEAREST\)
        cx = margin + \(i % cols\) * \(cell_size + margin\)
        cy = margin + \(i // cols\) * \(cell_size + margin + label_h\)
        out.paste\(enlarged, \(cx, cy\)\)
        x = -col * 18
        y = -row * 18
        draw.text\(\(cx, cy + cell_size\), f"c{col}r{row} {x},{y}", fill=\(0,0,0\)\)
    
    out.save\(filename\)

make_grid\(union_cells, "Union Berlin candidates", "/tmp/union_candidates.png"\)
make_grid\(heiden_cells, "Heidenheim candidates", "/tmp/heiden_candidates.png"\)
print\("Done"\)
PYEOF)
